title: Grammy Awards 2026: Best New Artist Betting Odds and Analysis
text: Olivia Dean is the frontrunner for Best New Artist at the 68th Grammy Awards, with -340 odds on FanDuel. Her competition includes Leon Thomas (+350), sombr (+1000), and several others with longer odds. According to the article, Dean has established herself as an industry darling since the release of The Art of Loving and benefits from the Recording Academy's historical preference for established singer-songwriters with classic artistry. The coverage notes that while competitors like Leon Thomas and Addison Rae have strong commercial momentum, Dean's soulful approach aligns with Academy voting patterns. Her appearance at the Spotify Best New Artist Party shortly before the February 1st ceremony further solidified her position as the favorite heading into the competition.
